creator: ka@nadoby.ru
text:
Forgot to mention that new Net::Twitter requires an up-to-date Moose, so
this PR is a prereq: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=135212

On Wed, Jun 3, 2009 at 8:40 PM, <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/135217'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=135217
>

> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
